{# Override ABlog's collection.html so tag/category/archive pages use the full Furo layout with the same blog-grid card style as the blog index page. #} {% extends "page.html" %} {% set fa = ablog.fontawesome %} {% block extrahead %} {{ super() }} {%- if archive_feed and feed_path %} {%- endif %} {% endblock extrahead %} {% block content %}

{{ header }} {% if collection.href %}{{ collection }} {% else %}{{ collection }}{% endif %}

{% for post in collection %} {%- set href = post.external_link if post.external_link else pathto(post.docname) %} {%- set cats = post.category | list %}
{%- if cats %}{{ cats[0] }}{%- else %}tbd{%- endif -%}
{% if cats %} {{ cats[0] }} {% endif %}

{{ post.title }}

{{ post.to_html(collection.docname) }}
{% if post.published %} {{ post.date.strftime(ablog.post_date_format) }} {% else %} Draft {% endif %}
{% endfor %}
{% endblock content %}
